prompt: Create a cozy hand-drawn colored-pencil and crayon style illustration of a cute pastel study room corner, with warm beige paper texture and sketchy brown outlines. Show one young woman with long wavy light brown hair sitting at a wooden desk and writing in an open journal with a black pen; her face is intentionally covered by a plain beige square censor block. She wears a frilly pink gingham dress with lace trim and a bow, seated on a wooden chair over a pink scalloped rug. The room contains exactly 1 large wooden desk with 2 visible drawers, 1 open notebook, 1 closed pink book stack, 1 teacup on a saucer, 1 pen, 1 wooden chair, 1 curtained window with flowers outside, 1 hanging vine, 4 potted plants, 1 bookshelf with colorful books, 1 small framed photo, 1 floral table lamp, and 1 framed flower picture on the wall. Include exactly 2 visible text labels: a pink hanging wall sign reading luffynodoo and a cloud speech-bubble sign reading ももいろ\nメモリーズ♡. Surround the scene with kawaii doodles: 4 large pink flowers, 8 yellow stars, 1 blue smiling cloud, 1 pink lollipop, 1 wrapped candy, small hearts and sparkles. Use soft pastel pink, cream, honey brown, pale yellow, mint green, and baby blue, with a whimsical Japanese stationery aesthetic, delicate crosshatching, cozy sunlight, and no photorealism.
